cheapest_finite_reuse_frontier.note: budgeted-window active label acquisition against true-label sampling

theorem.interpretation: Observed quality wins are not sufficient: a candidate must clear the event-compute multiplier, or have enough explicitly reusable selector work, to improve learning-signal density.
theorem.name: cross-artifact break-even frontier
